action.reasoning: Observation: smoke test succeeded and confirmed env/action format, but train.py failed when saving because it chdir'ed into /opt/habitat-lab-src before creating/saving the relative checkpoint path, so checkpoints/baseline was resolved under /opt/habitat-lab-src and did not exist. Analysis: this is the documented path footgun; we need to absolutize save_dir before any chdir side effects. Also predict.py currently modifies extra config fields and may suffer similar cwd issues. Decision: fix path handling in train/predict, keep the simple heuristic baseline, add a small local self-test with 5 episodes, then submit eval immediately to establish baseline/runtime.
